pending_items.whisper_rendering: "NAACP Legal Defense Fund" carefully distinguished from "NAACP organization"
pending_items.correction: LDF (1957 spinoff) vs NAACP parent organization
pending_items.notes: Pass 1 notes flagged the distinction the speaker carefully maintains. The 1957 spinoff (NAACP Legal Defense and Educational Fund, "LDF" / "Inc Fund") under Marshall's leadership was legally separate from the parent NAACP for IRS-501c3-fundraising and litigation-strategy reasons. This is a substantive distinction other corpus transcripts conflate; the catalog should flag the distinction for any LLM summary downstream. // [LAYER-5: phantom-rendering, fuzzy=79.2, ensemble-adjudication-pending]
